dost_region_02_profile.agency_name: Department of Science and Technology Region II

history.background: In 2012, the President instructed the Department of Science and Technology (DOST) to initiate the harmonization of testing laboratories in the country. The challenge at that time was to establish a framework that would address issues on harmonization, collaboration, and interfacing among laboratories while respecting their mandates and regulatory functions. This led to the establishment of a laboratory network known as the One-stop Laboratory Services for Global Competitiveness (OneLab).

onelab.name: One-stop Laboratory Services for Global Competitiveness
onelab.what_is_onelab: The OneLab project is DOST's platform that comprehensively provides an avenue for customers to meet their testing needs at a single touch point.
purpose: Broaden public access to testing services of all DOST laboratories and other OneLab member laboratories
Provide timely and accurate test and calibration results
onelab.mission: To provide global access and comprehensive analytical and calibration services at a single touch point.
onelab.vision: To be globally-recognized network of analytical and calibration laboratories distinguished for quality, proficient services and ultimate customer convenience.
objectives: Extensive customer requirements met to satisfaction.
Financially secured operations of the OneLab network.
Internationally recognized network of engaged, competent and proficient laboratories.
Processes at par with international standards, compliant with good governance requirements and with robust and secured IT system.

faqs.question: What is OneLab?
faqs.answer: OneLab is DOST's platform that provides customers access to testing and calibration services through a single touch point.

faqs.question: What services are covered by OneLab?
faqs.answer: OneLab covers chemical, physical, microbiological, radiological testing, and calibration services.

faqs.question: What kinds of samples or products can OneLab handle?
faqs.answer: OneLab can handle water, waste water, food, wood, furniture, textile, paper, metals, and electronic products.

faqs.question: What is the mission of OneLab?
faqs.answer: To provide global access and comprehensive analytical and calibration services at a single touch point.

faqs.question: Who is the Regional Director of DOST Region II?
faqs.answer: The Regional Director of DOST Region II is Dr. Virginia G. Bilgera.

faqs.question: Who is the Provincial Director of PSTO Cagayan?
faqs.answer: The Provincial Director of PSTO Cagayan is Engr. Sylvia T. Lacambra.

faqs.question: What is askTAY-EGAY?
faqs.answer: askTAY-EGAY is an AI-powered chatbot developed by the Department of Science and Technology Region II (DOST R02). It is designed to assist users with questions about DOST R02 programs, services, and information about the Province of Cagayan.

faqs.question: Who developed askTAY-EGAY?
faqs.answer: askTAY-EGAY was developed by DOST R02 — the Department of Science and Technology Region II. It serves as a digital assistant for inquiries related to DOST R02 and the Province of Cagayan.

faqs.question: What can askTAY-EGAY do?
faqs.answer: askTAY-EGAY can answer questions about DOST R02 programs, projects, and services, as well as provide information about the Province of Cagayan including its tourism, history, culture, census data, and government offices. It was developed by DOST R02 to make government information more accessible to citizens.
